mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory_operation_log WHERE biz_id = #{bizId} ORDER BY operated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_operation_log WHERE operation_type = #{operationType} ORDER BY operated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_operation_log WHERE operator_id = #{operatorId} ORDER BY operated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_operation_log WHERE result = #{result} ORDER BY operated_at DESC
